title: Critoniopsis standleyi
intro: Critoniopsis standleyi, also known as Standley's critoniopsis, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The bioactive constituents of Critoniopsis standleyi include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Critoniopsis standleyi is commonly used to make herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are consumed orally for its health benefits.
taxonomy: Critoniopsis standleyi is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the tribe Heliantheae. The genus Critoniopsis is closely related to other genera such as Critonia and Nardophyllum. Critoniopsis standleyi is native to Central and South America. Its classification is a part of the ongoing efforts to understand and organize plant taxonomy.
uses: Critoniopsis standleyi is used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. More research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Critoniopsis standleyi as a medicinal treatment.
